calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court modified its tenative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Judgment Debtor Linda M. Maroney is granted in part and denied in part. Creditor shall take $65.00 per pay period. $364.47 being held by the Sheriff's Office is to be disbursed to the Judgment Creditor as payment on the judgment. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
